title: carpesium nepalense var. glandulosum
intro: Carpesium nepalense var. glandulosum, a variant of the Carpesium nepalense plant, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Carpesium nepalense var. glandulosum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are believed to offer various health benefits when consumed or applied topically.
